prompt: Ultra-realistic night portrait of a beautiful young woman standing on a balcony overlooking a city skyline, wearing an elegant sleeveless cream plaid dress, soft blush makeup, natural glossy lips, and a relaxed half-up hairstyle with loose face-framing strands. Looking back over her shoulder toward the camera with a gentle expression, warm flash photography illuminating her face against a dark night sky. City lights and apartment windows glowing softly in the background, cinematic urban atmosphere, high contrast lighting, shallow depth of field, dreamy bokeh, realistic skin texture, detailed eyes, fashion editorial photography, luxury lifestyle aesthetic, DSLR quality, 85mm lens, f/1.8, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, soft color grading, masterpiece, 8k.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic night portrait of a beautiful young woman standing on a balcony overlooking a city skyline, wearing an elegant sleeveless cream plaid dress, soft blush makeup, natural glossy lips, and a relaxed half-up hairstyle with loose face-framing strands. Looking back over her shoulder toward the camera with a gentle expression, warm flash photography illuminating her face against a dark night sky. City lights and apartment windows glowing softly in the background, cinematic urban atmosphere, high contrast lighting, shallow depth of field, dreamy bokeh, realistic skin texture, detailed eyes, fashion editorial photography, luxury lifestyle aesthetic, DSLR quality, 85mm lens, f/1.8, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, soft color grading, masterpiece, 8k.
promptZh: 超写实夜间人像，一位美丽的年轻女性站在俯瞰城市天际线的阳台上，身穿 优雅的奶油色格纹无袖连衣裙，妆容清透，双唇自然润泽，半扎发造型随性自然，几缕发丝修饰脸庞。她回眸看向镜头，表情温柔，暖色闪光灯照亮她的脸庞，与深邃的夜空形成对比。背景中城市灯火与公寓窗户柔和闪烁，充满电影感的都市氛围，高对比度光影，浅景深，梦幻焦外，真实的皮肤质感，细腻的眼部细节，时尚杂志摄影风格，奢华生活方式美学，单反相机画质，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，照片级真实感，超高细节，柔和调色，杰作，8k。
